data.name: Click Quest
data.detailed_description:
“CLICK QUEST” is the new clicker, with 4 beautiful naked girls in different poses. With awesome 2D animation, this is a must play!

In the game there will be many Star pictures fallin and you should click on all of them to get Point, with that our girls will rewards you!



What you can find in the game:
• Beautiful pictures and animations of girls.
• Incredible sound and visual effects.
• Gallery with hot pictures of girls.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
